exceptions.reason: The one-shot key initializer needs narrowly scoped ownership capabilities to prepare the shared key volume.
mitigations: Only CHOWN, DAC_OVERRIDE, and FOWNER are granted to the initializer.
The long-running authentication service is read-only and runs as UID 65532.

exceptions.reason: The one-shot key initializer creates and assigns the private RSA key to the non-root service identity.
mitigations: The root initializer exits before the network service starts.
The generated private key is mode 0600 and the service runs as UID 65532.
